title: BUG #17570: Unrecognized node type for query with statistics on expressions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value DECIMAL CHECK (value >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table(name, value) VALUES ('test1', 10.5), ('test2', NULL), ('test3', -5);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR CAST(value AS INTEGER) = 10;
key_bug_features: SELECT with ungranted permissions on statistics
